headline: Cathie Wood Bought Only These 4 Stocks Last Week
summary: Ark Invest didn't buy a lot last week, making the names that it did pounce on that much more interesting.

headline: Omaha restaurant owner drops delivery apps after paying $188K for 1 year of fees. Is in-house delivery coming back?
summary: As popular food-delivery apps rake in billions, restaurants are rethinking whether the price of convenience is worth paying.

raw.headline: Omaha restaurant owner drops delivery apps after paying $188K for 1 year of fees. Is in-house delivery coming back?
